diagrams.title: Process State Diagram
diagrams.description: Five-state process model showing all possible transitions between states
elements: Arrows with labels: Admission, Dispatch, Preemption, I/O Request, I/O Complete, Exit
diagrams.purpose: Understand process lifecycle and state transitions

diagrams.title: Process Control Block Structure
diagrams.description: Components of PCB showing all stored information
diagrams.purpose: Visualize what information OS maintains for each process

diagrams.title: Scheduling Queues Model
diagrams.description: Shows how processes move between different queues in the system
diagrams.purpose: Understand process flow through system and role of schedulers

visuals.title: Events And Process States
visuals.description: Visual diagram for events and process states
